evidence.raw_snippet:
PubMed ID: 29594251. 2018/01/11 00:00. PURPOSE: External beam radiation therapy (EBRT), concomitant cisplatin, and 
magnetic resonance image guided adaptive brachytherapy performed according to 
the EMBRACE-II study protocol (IntErnational study on MRI-guided BRAchytherapy 
in locally advanced CErvical cancer) is considered state-of-the-art for the 
treatment of locally advanced cervical cancer. The aim of the present study was
